dialogue_text: I am a Cowardly Lion, afraid of everything. I came to you to beg that you give me courage, so that in reality I may become the King of Beasts, as men call me.
source_excerpt: And the Lion answered, "I am a Cowardly Lion, afraid of everything. I came to you to beg that you give me courage, so that in reality I may become the King of Beasts, as men call me."

speaker.notes: Matched speaker phrase 'And the Lion' to 'cowardly_lion'.
